/usr/bin/gcc-12 -g -T/home/dim-sim/workspace/uni/past/telemetry_validation/transmitter/stm32l432xc_flash.ld -Wl,-Map=telemetry_transmitter.map -u _printf_float --specs=nosys.specs -Wl,--start-group -lc -lm -lstdc++ -lsupc++ -Wl,--end-group -Wl,-z,max-page-size=8 -Wl,--print-memory-usage CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Src/stm32l4xx_hal_msp.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Src/stm32l4xx_it.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Src/system_stm32l4xx.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Drivers/STM32L4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32l4xx_hal.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Drivers/STM32L4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32l4xx_hal_cortex.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Drivers/STM32L4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32l4xx_hal_dma.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Drivers/STM32L4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32l4xx_hal_dma_ex.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Drivers/STM32L4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32l4xx_hal_exti.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Drivers/STM32L4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32l4xx_hal_flash.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Drivers/STM32L4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32l4xx_hal_flash_ex.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Drivers/STM32L4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32l4xx_hal_flash_ramfunc.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Drivers/STM32L4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32l4xx_hal_gpio.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Drivers/STM32L4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32l4xx_hal_i2c.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Drivers/STM32L4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32l4xx_hal_i2c_ex.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Drivers/STM32L4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32l4xx_hal_pwr.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Drivers/STM32L4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32l4xx_hal_pwr_ex.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Drivers/STM32L4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32l4xx_hal_rcc.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Drivers/STM32L4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32l4xx_hal_rcc_ex.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Drivers/STM32L4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32l4xx_hal_tim.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Drivers/STM32L4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32l4xx_hal_tim_ex.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Drivers/STM32L4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32l4xx_hal_uart.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Drivers/STM32L4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32l4xx_hal_uart_ex.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Src/syscall.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Src/sysmem.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_transmitter.dir/Src/startup_stm32l432xx.S.o -o telemetry_transmitter   -L/home/dim-sim/workspace/uni/past/telemetry_validation/transmitter/telemetry_transmitter
